recent.statement: The Nasdaq 100 futures will close below 28700
recent.evidence: Nasdaq 100 futures are at 28831.25, above the 28700 threshold, so the forecast of closing below 28700 did not occur.

recent.statement: A severe thunderstorm warning will be issued for the New York City area
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a severe thunderstorm warning for NYC would certainly have been captured if issued during the closed window.

recent.statement: The Nasdaq 100 futures will close below 29000
recent.evidence: Nasdaq 100 futures show 28831.25, which is below the 29000 threshold.

recent.statement: A severe thunderstorm warning will be issued for the northeastern United States
recent.evidence: All three severe thunderstorm warnings were issued by NWS offices in Oklahoma, Montana, and Arizona, none in the northeastern United States.

recent.statement: A severe thunderstorm warning will be issued for the Mid-Atlantic region in the next 24 hours.
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a severe thunderstorm warning across the Mid-Atlantic would certainly have been captured if it had occurred.

recent.statement: A severe thunderstorm warning will be issued for the state of Ohio
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a severe thunderstorm warning for Ohio would certainly have been captured if issued within the window.

recent.statement: Severe thunderstorms will affect the Midwest region in the United States within the next 24 hours.
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, yet severe thunderstorms across the Midwest would certainly have been captured if they occurred.

recent.statement: The Federal Reserve will raise interest rates at their meeting on July 28th
recent.evidence: S6 shows the July 28 FOMC meeting was merely scheduled, with no signal indicating any rate increase occurred.

recent.statement: A Severe Thunderstorm Warning will be issued for the Cleveland area
recent.evidence: No captured signal shows a Severe Thunderstorm Warning was issued for the Cleveland area within the window.

recent.statement: A severe thunderstorm warning will be issued for the Raleigh-Durham area in North Carolina.
recent.evidence: The only warning was issued by NWS Newport/Morehead City for coastal NC (~36.2,-75.7), not the Raleigh-Durham area served by NWS Raleigh, and no signal names Raleigh-Durham.

recent.statement: A severe thunderstorm warning will be issued for the Washington D.C. area within the next 24 hours.
recent.evidence: No signal shows a Severe Thunderstorm Warning for the Washington D.C. area; the warnings are from KY, GA, OK, and NC offices, none covering D.C.

recent.statement: A tornado will touch down in the Cleveland, OH area.
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a tornado touchdown in Cleveland would certainly have been recorded, yet none is present.
